filepath.name: filepath
filepath.description: File path for this file. If it has a / at the end it will be treated as a directory name and the filename will the generated. If it does not have a /, the last part will be treated as a filename. If filepath does not start with / (relative path) then the session directory will be pre-pended to make the path absolute.

check_filepath_exists.name: check_filepath_exists
check_filepath_exists.description: Perform a check to make sure the file path exists before proceeding with the application

streaming.name: streaming
streaming.description: Specifies whether this data component streams input and output data

persist.name: persist
persist.description: Specifies whether this data component contains data that should not be deleted after execution

delete_parent_directory.name: delete_parent_directory
delete_parent_directory.description: Also delete the parent directory of this file when deleting the file itself

group_end.name: group_end
group_end.description: Is this node the end of a group?

output_parser.name: output_parser
output_parser.description: Output port parsing technique Mapping from argname to default value. Should match only the last part of the argnames list. Values are interpreted as Python code literals and that means string values need to be quoted.

func_arg_mapping.name: func_arg_mapping
func_arg_mapping.description: Mapping between argument name and input drop uids

func_code.name: func_code
func_code.description: Python function code, e.g. 'def function_name(args): return args'

group_start.description: Is this node the start of a group?

input_error_threshold.name: input_error_threshold
input_error_threshold.description: The allowed failure rate of the inputs (in percent), before this component goes to ERROR state and is not executed

n_tries.name: n_tries
n_tries.description: Specifies the number of times the 'run' method will be executed before finally giving up
